marca.tagline: Traducimos el caos en estructuras lógicas
marca.tono: riguroso, místico, cercano, orgánico, intelectual — Misticismo Lógico
marca.inspiracion_visual: La Princesa Mononoke (Studio Ghibli) — bosque ancestral místico y salvaje, bioluminiscencia, kodamas
marca.origen: Valle de Aburrá, Universidad de Antioquia, Medellín

imagenes.prompt: Mystical ancient forest clearing at twilight, dense dark green canopy (#0F2519), bioluminescent teal-blue light (#A3E4D7) emanating from kodama-like spirits perched on massive moss-covered tree roots, subtle iron-grey stone structures with logical symbols carved into them emerging from the forest floor, atmospheric fog and volumetric god-rays filtering through branches, Studio Ghibli Princess Mononoke aesthetic, where nature and logic coexist, clean negative space for text overlay, 8k quality, painterly digital art, cinematic lighting

Dark enchanted forest scene, four luminous teal-blue (#A3E4D7) organic pathways representing writing formalization verification collaboration converging into one radiant ancient tree at center, deep forest green (#0F2519) atmosphere, bioluminescent mushrooms and moss along the paths, iron-grey (#3A3F41) geometric rune stones marking each pathway, subtle dark red (#8B0000) energy veins in the tree trunk, Ghibli mystical forest aesthetic, order emerging from wilderness, 8k quality, painterly illustration

Ancient forest library carved into a massive living tree, translucent floating panels of structured knowledge glowing in teal-blue (#A3E4D7) light among the branches, deep dark green (#0F2519) environment, iron-grey stone shelves holding luminous scrolls and mathematical formulas, moss and roots intertwining with logical diagrams, atmospheric mist, Studio Ghibli aesthetic, nature holding human knowledge, 8k quality, painterly digital art, volumetric lighting

Ultra-wide panoramic view of a mystical ancient forest canopy stretching to the horizon, deep dark green (#0F2519) to iron grey (#3A3F41) gradient, scattered bioluminescent teal-blue (#A3E4D7) kodama spirits glowing softly among branches fading from right to left, clean negative space on left third for logo placement, atmospheric fog layers, subtle dark red (#8B0000) dawn light at horizon, Studio Ghibli Princess Mononoke panoramic landscape, 8k quality, cinematic wide shot

Square format, centered ancient tree with roots forming a perfect geometric mandala pattern, bioluminescent teal-blue (#A3E4D7) light pulsing through root networks like logical connections, deep dark forest green (#0F2519) background, small kodama spirits sitting on branches observing, iron-grey (#3A3F41) stone circle at the base with carved symbols, Ghibli mystical forest aesthetic, nature as structured knowledge, generous negative space, 8k quality, painterly style

Square format, dark chaotic overgrown forest at night, tangled dead branches and scattered broken stone tablets with illegible text, disconnected fragments of documents and tools lost among thorns and decay, dark oppressive green-black atmosphere, dark red (#8B0000) warning glow from dying embers on the ground, visual chaos representing research tool fragmentation and academic disorder, no bioluminescence only darkness, 8k quality, Ghibli dark forest aesthetic, ominous mood

Square format, the same forest now healed and luminous, four organic streams of bioluminescent teal-blue (#A3E4D7) energy representing writing formalization verification collaboration flowing together into a central ancient tree now alive and glowing, deep forest green (#0F2519) environment restored, kodama spirits returning, iron-grey structures now integrated with living roots, order and life emerging from previous chaos, Studio Ghibli healing scene aesthetic, 8k quality, hopeful atmospheric lighting

Vertical format, immersive view looking upward through a towering ancient forest canopy, deep dark green (#0F2519) foliage above, bioluminescent teal-blue (#A3E4D7) kodama spirits and glowing spores floating upward like ascending ideas, atmospheric god-rays penetrating the canopy, large clean central area for text overlay, subtle dark red (#8B0000) accent flowers on the forest floor at bottom, Ghibli mystical vertical forest scene, 8k quality, dreamy atmospheric depth

Vertical format, bold centered composition of a large luminous kodama spirit with teal-blue (#A3E4D7) glow standing on an iron-grey (#3A3F41) stone pedestal carved with Greek letters, deep dark forest green (#0F2519) background, bioluminescent roots radiating outward from the base, clean negative space at top and bottom for title text, dark red (#8B0000) subtle accent on the carved symbols, Ghibli spirit guardian aesthetic, 8k quality, striking and iconic

Wide format, ancient stone tablet covered in moss transforming into a luminous structured document, chaotic organic matter on the left resolving into precise teal-blue (#A3E4D7) glowing logical notation on the right, deep forest green (#0F2519) environment, iron-grey (#3A3F41) stone surface, bioluminescent moss tracing the transformation, Ghibli aesthetic where nature becomes structure, 8k quality, painterly digital art, atmospheric lighting

Wide format, five ancient standing stones arranged in a forest clearing forming a research pipeline from left to right — raw idea seed draft formalize verify collaborate — each stone progressively more luminous with teal-blue (#A3E4D7) bioluminescent connections between them, deep forest green (#0F2519) backdrop, iron-grey (#3A3F41) megaliths with carved symbols, glowing root network connecting their bases underground, Ghibli stone circle aesthetic, 8k quality
